title: CYBER92 DATAWAR
description:
ENTER A BROKEN REALITYWelcome to CYBER92 DATAWAR, a fast-paced, Retro-Realistic Cyberpunk Shooter where perception is your greatest weapon. This is a distorted digital nightmare where reality fractures, glitches, and collapses in real time. Shift between experimental 2nd-person and 3rd-person perspectives, and fight through a world where your vision is no longer reliable, and survival depends on how you interpret the chaos.

 A First-of-its-Kind PERSPECTIVE (Second-Person Shooter)This is not a traditional shooter. Experience a rare second-person system fused with third-person combat, where awareness, positioning, and perception are constantly manipulated. What you see cannot be trusted, and what you don’t see may already be hunting you.

MASTER TIME & SPACEEngage in brutal, high-pressure combat where time-space distortion is your only advantage. Bend the flow of reality to dodge incoming fire, chain precise shots, and execute devastating close-quarters melee attacks. Enemies emerge without warning, forcing instant reactions in a battlefield that never stabilizes.

HACK YOUR VISION & ADAPTReality is corrupted, but you can reconfigure it. Cycle through 7 radically different vision modes to survive the visual noise and expose hidden threats. Shift between stark black-and-white clarity, aggressive green night vision, surreal purple thermal distortions, and much more. Each mode reshapes the fight and your understanding of the world.

CONTROL THE CHAOSWhen precision fails, unleash destruction. Commandeer fully drivable tanks and tear through enemy lines in explosive, physics-driven combat. Environments collapse, systems fail, and control becomes an illusion in a battlefield built to break.

A STORY BEYOND THE SCREENBeneath the collapsing system lies a fractured meta-narrative. As the main character reaches total system failure, the developer breaches their own creation using a physical floppy disk, rewriting the code, restoring life, and triggering a surreal connection between creator and creation. Reality no longer exists only inside the game.

KEY FEATURES• Experimental 2nd-person and 3rd-person combat system

• Time-space distortion mechanics for precision and survival

• 7 unique vision modes (glitch, thermal, night, abstract, and...)

• Brutal gunplay combined with melee combat

• Stealth-based gameplay and tactical repositioning

• Drivable tanks and destructible environments

• Surreal cyberpunk world with a meta-narrative twist
description_short: CYBER92 DATAWAR is a Surreal, Retro-Realistic Cyberpunk Shooter, First time 3rd/2nd-Person perspective. 90's Pixel-Glitch Art style. Shift through glitching vision modes, use destructive vehicles, and survive a fractured, twisted reality under constant time pressure.
